name: AI Policy Assistants
what: LLMs that draft and red-team legislation.
how: Models find contradictions and unintended consequences.

name: RegTech & Compliance
how: Rules engines and ML flag violations continuously.

name: Regulatory Tech (RegTech)
what: Technology that enhances the efficiency of regulatory processes.
how: Automating and improving compliance with regulations.

name: Regulatory Sandboxes for Innovation Testing
what: Provides a safe environment to test new technologies.
how: Facilitates the adoption of emerging technologies and their integration into existing frameworks.

name: Regulatory Technology (RegTech)
use: Automating regulatory compliance processes to reduce costs and improve efficiency.
what: RegTech solutions help organizations meet legal requirements by automating document management, reporting, and audit trails.
how: These tools use AI and machine learning to analyze data, detect anomalies, and generate reports in real-time.

name: Regulatory Frameworks for AI Ethics
what: Developing regulatory frameworks to ensure the responsible use of AI.
how: Promoting transparency and accountability in AI development and deployment.
